title: His Exciting Night
writer: Katharine Kavanaugh, Pat C. Flick, Edward Eliscu
actors: Charles Ruggles, Ona Munson, Maxie Rosenbloom
plot: Adam Tripp (Charles Ruggles), a mild-mannered, timid office clerk, becomes the butt of several practical jokes on his wedding-eve night, and nearly loses his bride-to-be, Anne Baker (Ona Munson).
